include-in-header.text:
<style>
#title-block-header {
  background-image: url(images/Cloisters at Glasgow University.jpg);
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  height: 250px;
}
/* Title */
.quarto-title-block .title {
  font-size: 3.5rem !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
}
/* Subtitle */
.quarto-title-block .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.6rem !important;
  color: white;
}
/* Metadata (if any) */
#title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
  color: white;
}
</style>

markdown.markdown:
::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon="false"}

Pre-conference tutorials will take place at the [School of Maths & Stats](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=School+of+Mathematics+and+Statistics+University+of+Glasgow)

Please refer to the [pre-workshop section](workshops.qmd) for further details.
:::

<!-- **Getting there:** Short walk from Buchanan Street and Queen Street stations.\ -->
<!-- *Dress code guidance will be sent to registered participants closer to the event.* -->
<!-- ::: -->

## 🏛️ Civic Reception
Information about the welcome reception — including venue, timing, and dress code — will be added here closer to the event.
:::

# Awards

The Best Poster and Best Contributed Talk Awards recognise outstanding contributions to the workshop We are particularly committed to highlighting the achievements of early-career researchers (within 8 years of completion of PhD), including PhD students and postdoctoral fellows.

Award winners will be announced on the final day of the workshop. All submissions for contributed talks and posters by students and early-career researchers will automatically be considered for these awards.

::::


:::

  background-position: center;

}

  font-size: 3.5rem !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
}
/* Subtitle */
